Implements event queue, mutex, semaphore, callout functionalities, and interrupt handlers for NRF52.


## Files
- **[npl_os_pebble.c](npl_os_pebble.c.md)**: Implements event queue, mutex, semaphore, and callout functionalities for Pebble OS using NimBLE.
- **[nrf52.c](nrf52.c.md)**: Implements interrupt service routines and handlers for NRF52 hardware components.
